text.title: Service Bootstrap Checklist Procedure
text.summary: 7-step procedure applying the service-bootstrap-checklist methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: scaffold-from-template
step.action: Instantiate repo + CI + base service skeleton.

step.name: wire-observability
step.action: Add structured logging, metrics, healthcheck, dashboard.

step.name: wire-alerting
step.action: Add alerts referencing dashboards; lock rollback triggers.

step.name: assign-rota
step.action: Set up rota; verify pager test page.
